task objective: Implement medium priority cleanups from the 2026-06-18 code-quality-fixes plan (Items 8-11).
design decisions: Removed dead fields `isMounted` and `setBusyLabel` from the frontend mutation options since they were not used. Dropped `service: Any` params from Coordinator and LogBuffer as they were stored but never read. Consolidated duplicate syncthing predicates into `autoSyncStatusRenderer`. Extracted inline `SILENT_SKIPPED_REASONS` constant in the lifecycle controller.
results: All tests (pytest, vitest), formatting (ruff format), and linting (ruff, ty) pass. Four atomic commits created for the fixes.
